text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Are there any racers today who I haven't faced
before?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: ...I see. That makes it more interesting!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: You chose this race specifically for me, right?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Then I'll definitely do my best. I'm getting all
excited.
